fault_hypothesis: The average on line 68 is calculated by dividing by the fixed `window` size instead of the actual number of samples in `tail`. This is incorrect when the length of the series is less than the window size.

constraints.intent: The average must be the total divided by the actual number of samples.
If an average is returned, the sample window must have been full.
The number of samples must either fill the window or be too few to pass warmup.
